Petition To Recover Trust Property
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Continued To Nov-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yuji Mitani for Petitioner. Paul Newman for Rex Yamamoto (Respondent).

Mr. Mitani stated that they had negotiations in the conservatorship matter and that it is on calendar for November 8, 2012. Mr. Newman stated that he will include this matter in his mediation statement. The Petition to Recover Trust Property was continued to November 20, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the petition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Clauzel.
